## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / performance improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style of this project (`go fmt`, `go vet`, `golangci-lint`)
- [ ] I have added tests that cover the new/changed behaviour
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`go test -race ./...`)
- [ ] Mocks are regenerated if contracts changed (`go generate ./...`)
- [ ] `go.mod` and `go.sum` are tidy (`go mod tidy`)
- [ ] I have updated the README if the public API changed
